source_pr.title: util: add PreAlloc4Row and Insert for Chunk and List
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
This is a preparation work for parallel partition. 
Add two new member function for \*chunk.Chunk and \*chunk.List.
- PreAlloc4Row(row Row): pre-allocate the needed memory space for `row` but **does not** write the data. 
*Note: nullBitMap info will be written in this function, since Chunk.nullBitMap can not be accessed parallely.*
- Insert(rowIdx int, row Row): insert the data of `row` at the position speficied by `rowIdx`.
*Note: Insert can only be called after PreAlloc4Row, or it will cause unexpected errors.*

### What is changed and how it works?
N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes

 - Has interface methods change

N/A

Related changes
